title: City of Angels
overview: An amnesiac named Elle enters Los Angeles, carrying only a locked data device that may hold the secrets of her past.

title: All We Are Not
overview: Haunted by traumatic memories, Elle recognizes a familiar face. Upon tracking him down she uncovers a shocking truth about herself and her memories.

title: The Human Condition
overview: With help from the mysterious J, Elle learns more startling truths about the nature of her identity…

title: The Doll Hunt
overview: Elle's memories come flooding back, revealing the truth of what happened to her in the desert. Meanwhile, LAPD Officer Davis puts together the clues that will lead her to Black Lotus.

title: Pressure
overview: Elle plots her revenge with help from J, but Police Chief Grant has mobilized a massive LAPD manhunt to find and eliminate her.

title: Persistence of Memory
overview: In her quest for revenge, Elle breaks into the home of her next target and is forced to take a hostage. Chief Grant calls in reinforcements.

title: Reality
overview: After learning J's shameful secret, Elle leaves to complete her mission: to kill the last of the Doll Hunt participants.

title: The Davis Report
overview: Frustrated that no one believes her theory about Black Lotus, Officer Davis lands in hot water while presenting her findings to the department.

title: Free Will
overview: Elle goes after the final target to complete her mission of revenge, the man responsible for the Doll Hunt.

title: Clair de Lune
overview: As Elle struggles with not knowing which of her memories are real and which are artificial, J opens up about his own past.

title: All the Best Memories
overview: Desperately lost and searching for peace, Elle hatches a radical plan to put her haunted memories to rest.

title: Artificial Souls
overview: While Elle has her first encounter with a dangerous new foe, J has his final encounter with his former colleague Marlowe.

title: Time to Die
overview: Left with no other option, Elle faces off against the architect of her suffering.
